feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: how do lower/middle class western anons plan to escape the 9-5 or retire at a de…

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Vidya Enemy Recasting
entry.content: What do you think video game enemies do when they are waiting for their series to get a new installment for them to be casted in? (Picrel; Mancubus and Cacodemon after DOOM II)
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: These are the games Steam has recommended me due to my recent playtime in other …
entry.content: These are the games Steam has recommended me due to my recent playtime in other Dungeon Crawler games. My question is why considering said dungeon crawler games were Operencia the Stolen Sun(pretty so-so game, has a neat OST but the combat just drags the fuck on in later acts) and Fall of the Dungeon Guardians(is okay but made me want to play grimcock mods again). Diablo, PoE, Cult of the Lamb and Minecraft Dungeons aren't really comparable.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I've seen the sentiment thrown around that games, in particular valve games, sho…
entry.content: I've seen the sentiment thrown around that games, in particular valve games, should have in-game communication censored or monitored to prevent "abusive language" (calling people niggers, faggots, etc etc) even when there are features to mute people. I know what /v/'s opinion on this topic is, but my question is how do people genuinely believe that censorship over something so minor is a good thing? Genuinely what causes this sentiment? I posted it in a thread as a reply instead of on the catalo
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >play PS5 Enhanced Edition >it's gay, soulless, and sterile >play the PS3 versio…
entry.content: >play PS5 Enhanced Edition >it's gay, soulless, and sterile >play the PS3 version >it's comfy and nostalgic >no online shit forced in your face on startup >artstyle and lighting is miles better >oozes style with saturated colors and sharp contrast >looks less overly busy >has actual vehicle deformations >car handling is far better and cars aren't glue to the road like formula 1 >cars have a greater sense of speed >rain and weather effects are more satisfying >UI looks better >police are more agg
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: GTA3 really stands out from the rest of the series. Though it lacks many of the …
entry.content: GTA3 really stands out from the rest of the series. Though it lacks many of the defining features and quality-of-life improvements seen in later games, the vibe it has going on is so goddamn thick that it compensates for any such inadequacies. Soon you don't even remember that you can't jump out of cars. Did you know that the way the game is programmed, the weather in the city is almost always rainy or foggy, with only a small chance of sunshine? And it makes sense, really: Vice City is famously
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /news/ News: US Treasury Secretary announces gold coin featuring Trump’s portrait
entry.content: https://www.yahoo.com/news/politics /articles/us-treasury-secretary-ann ounces-gold-144848271.html US President Donald Trump's likeness will soon be on yet another object - this time a $1 gold coin Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent unveiled on Wednesday. It is to mark the 250th anniversary of the United States and is "to honor the enduring legacy of liberty and a lasting symbol of patriotism," Bessent announced on X. A sample can be seen in the post. The US Mint would begin producing the coin, Be
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /news/ News: Canadian wildfire smoke spreads extremely poor air quality to millions as plume invades US
entry.content: A recent wildfire outbreak across western Ontario, Canada is sending thick plumes of smoke toward the Great Lakes and Northeast through Thursday, bringing extremely hazardous air quality and potentially some orange skies reminiscent of the Mars-like skies that enveloped New York City in June 2023. The smoke has been contained north of the Great Lakes so far, but a shift in the winds heading into Wednesday will allow it to pour into the Lower 48 and could reach the Interstate 95 corridor by the e
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3008
entry.content: >All Natural Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84094827/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Telegram Serverless
entry.content: https://core.telegram.org/bots/serv erless >Telegram Serverless lets you run backend code for your bot and Mini App directly on Telegram's infrastructure — no servers to provision, no containers to keep alive, no scaling to think about. You write plain JavaScript modules, deploy them with a single command, and Telegram runs them in a fast, isolated V8 sandbox that sits right next to the Bot API and a built‑in database. There's no excuse anymore, anon. You can deploy your own personal assistant u
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: >You're not to think you are anything special. >You're not to think you are as g…
entry.content: >You're not to think you are anything special. >You're not to think you are as good as we are. >You're not to think you are smarter than we are. >You're not to imagine yourself better than we are. >You're not to think you know more than we do. >You're not to think you are more important than we are. >You're not to think you are good at anything. >You're not to laugh at us. >You're not to think anyone cares about you. >You're not to think you can teach us anything.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: In retrospect, was Joffrey even in the wrong here?
entry.content: At the time of Ned Stark's execution there were 4 rebellions forming - Robb's (he wasn't declared king yet, and it had nothing to do with Joffrey's legitimacy) - Renly's (once again, Renly had no idea Joffrey was a bastard, and it's even worse for his cause if he is, since it makes Stannis the legitimate option) - Balon's (completely unrelated to Joffrey's legitimacy) - Stannis (The disgruntled uncle disliked by everyone) Letting Ned Stark live, even by going to the wall, would likely result in
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I've been watching a lot of first term-Obama millennialcore lately and one thing…
entry.content: I've been watching a lot of first term-Obama millennialcore lately and one thing I keep noticing is how normalized heavy drug use and drinking is in all these shows/movies. It does seem to be a thing with middle millennials born in the late 80s early 90s where a lot of them became serious drug addicts and alcoholics so maybe that's just reflected in shows like picrel but I find it almost disturbing how casually it portrays taking drugs and drinking on a daily basis. Like in those Seth Rogan movi
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.content: Hello so I know my thread isn't gonna be that random but im here to talk about something I can't talk anywere else. He was obssesed with shit like goon and some random sh.. anyways he leaked nudes abt me, tell at all his friends that my sexual asault was fake and laugh abt it knowing damn well that I wanted
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The worst part about encroaching $100 games is these games werent even worth $60…
entry.content: The worst part about encroaching $100 games is these games werent even worth $60 to begin with. Most of these shits were $20 games, $40 at most but theyve got so much unnecessary bloat, money wasted in superfluous marketing that doesnt even reach a target who would ever buy their game and CEO pay that they need to try and wring people out for everything guppies will fork over. Dont buy these fuckin games, dont justify their bad choices, dont embolden their bloated and greedy existance. They serv
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >game announces last minute that various streamers will be getting skins >instea…
entry.content: >game announces last minute that various streamers will be getting skins >instead of them being in the game normally, you have to enter a button code to unlock them and they're completely hidden from view otherwise I have to respect, they seem to understand that a lot of people absolutely hate this kind of thing and would actively refuse to play the game if it was forced on them. Feels like the tide is turning.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Single handedly created the greatest action combat system of all time >Leaves w…
entry.content: >Single handedly created the greatest action combat system of all time >Leaves without a single acknowledgement afterwards It's not fair bros, I know stinky Activision suits are the reason why this never got a follow up and I hate them. From should own the IP and make it even better with a sequel.

entry.title: /int/ International: What type of socialist are you, /int/? Left wing or Right wing? >Socialism is th…
entry.content: What type of socialist are you, /int/? Left wing or Right wing? >Socialism is the science of dealing with the common weal. Communism is not Socialism. Marxism is not Socialism. The Marxians have stolen the term and confused its meaning. I shall take Socialism away from the Socialists. Socialism is an ancient Aryan, Germanic institution. Our German ancestors held certain lands in common. They cultivated the idea of the common weal. Marxism has no right to disguise itself as socialism. Socialism,
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Tips on garloid farming
entry.content: Hi, so I'm a beginner who was recently recommended getting into farming garloids. They're these big worm-like critters that make some silk-like substance which you can use for making clothes and whatnot, basically oversized silkworms but they don't die when you extract it. I don't know much about this because again, I'm a noob when it comes to this, so if there are some more experienced garloid farmers on here who know a lot about harvesting, can you provide me with some basic entry-level tips t
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Dave Kendall - R.I.P.
entry.content: Before streaming and YouTube and everything else, there was MTV. Dave Kendall created and hosted 120 Minutes which, along with Headbangers Ball, introduced new music and new bands to millions of viewers every week. He was as influential as any recording artist.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Very Best of Jackie Wilson [Rhino, 1995] I don't begrudge Wilson his three-C…
entry.content: The Very Best of Jackie Wilson [Rhino, 1995] I don't begrudge Wilson his three-CD box. Excess is the essence of the man; no point liking him if you can't abide a bit of schlock. What's that you say? Can't hear you with the band blaring. All right, a lot of schlock. Musically, the most transitional of the early masters was the creature of Dick Jacobs, whose orchestral overkill make the guys who buried Bobby Bland and Joe Turner in brass sound like acolytes of Louis Jordan. From "Lonely Teardrops"
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Can we discuss rich people money laundering with old cars?
entry.content: We all know that the reason old cars are so expensive is because rich people use them to launder money right? Why are we allowing this to happen? Even actual shitheaps that everyone agrees are shit are selling for absurd dollarydoos for no reason other than rich man 1 buys it to launder money and then sells it to rich man 2 for more than he paid for it. rinse repeat and now a Kingswood is fucking 80k. I am sick of this Jewish shit. At what point do we nuke Tel Aviv to clean this shit up?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /b/ Random: Proper but dirty fetish
entry.content: I have this very specific fetish about cute and innocent looking girls dressed properly/demurely but being dirty, in the sense of not having washed for a while (greasy hair, stinky pussy etc). I had this gf who looked like that and she was depressed (of course, they all are) so she often wouldn't shower for a few days, but she was also a huge slut, so we'd have lots of dirty sex, especially a lot of oral sex. For some reason I really enjoyed her stink, it was always good and not disgusting (whic
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: When you actually think about it, are the GTA games even actually good? Good eno…
entry.content: When you actually think about it, are the GTA games even actually good? Good enough to be this multi-billion singularity that GTA6 has grown into? The gameplay is basic, the shooting isn't satisfying, the driving is mixed, the missions are mostly all similar "drive somewhere, shoot some guys, it goes wrong and there's a car chase or something", and the humour is mostly "British developers taking the piss out of American culture ten years too late" that mostly goes over the head of people playing
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: physical media freakout is stupid
entry.content: what sets apart games apart from other goods(say, cars) is that it's intellectual property. if you copy someone else's game his game just doesn't vanish into thin air. with one copy of a game you can make an infinite number of games that's why games are shared-if you "purchase" a game on steam then valve decides to share their copy with you. if you torrent a game the game is shared among the pirate community. consolekeks have been brainwashed by marketing to think by buying a """physical copy"""
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >made by a french developper I understand now why this game is trash

entry.title: /int/ International: Why did Russians ethnically cleanse them? Don't get me wrong, Russians are hell …
entry.content: Why did Russians ethnically cleanse them? Don't get me wrong, Russians are hell spawns, but they relocated millions Crimean Tatars, Germans and Poles. The Baltic coast is a strategic location and they were okay to have this non-Russian ethnicity live there. If I would have been a the TSSSSAAAARRR I would have created a Russian ethnic-corridor from Königsberg through Wilnó to Minsk. Like how Poles captured the Baltic coast and removed the indigenous Germans from Danzig.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International
